description_long: This kiosk is an open, pavilion-like structure with a polygonal footprint and partial wall enclosures on three sides. The walls are primarily white, with some panels displaying large, high-resolution printed images or advertisements, likely for informational or promotional purposes. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, allowing for easy movement and interaction, and the open front provides clear access for visitors. Above the kiosk, a floating, three-dimensional sign with bold, blocky lettering is visible, serving as a prominent identifier. The roof is flat and minimal, blending seamlessly with the overall modern and clean design. The materials appear to be a combination of lightweight panels, likely composite or metal, and printed surfaces, with a sturdy base platform.
description: A modern, open-sided kiosk with white walls, large printed display panels, and a floating overhead sign. The structure is spacious, with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design.
description_view_0: The kiosk is seen from an angle showing the open front, white side walls, and two large display panels with images; the floating sign is visible above.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear and side of the kiosk, showing the back wall and the arrangement of display panels, with the floating sign reversed.
description_view_2: From this angle, the opposite side and rear are visible, with more display panels and the open front less prominent.
description_view_3: The open front and main access point are clearly visible, along with the arrangement of display panels and the overhead sign.
attribute_signage_type: Three-dimensional block letter sign, floating above the kiosk entrance, likely made of lightweight material; text is visible but partially obscured in some views.
attribute_door_configuration: Open entryway at the front; no visible doors.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, minimal overhang, constructed from the same material as the walls, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with clean lines and functional display surfaces.
